			'cookies'   => $_COOKIE,
			'blocking'  => false,

		)

chain.expression:
wp_safe_redirect(
					add_query_arg(
						array(
							'redirect_to'               => $redirect_to,
							'request_redirect_to'       => $_request_redirect_to,
							'calypso_env'               => ( new Host() )->get_calypso_env(),
							'jetpack-sso-auth-redirect' => '1',
						),
						admin_url()
					)
				)
